subject: fix(review): address code review findings across branch
body:
Fix stale state in SummaryField (realtime sync), harden markAllAsRead
with Promise.allSettled for partial failure resilience, eliminate
subscription churn in useModules via fetchVersions ref pattern,
clean up redundant regex range, and document N+1 version fetching.

Tags: review, bugfix, hardening, cleanup
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: api-migration
Semver: patch
